text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I didn't end up running the way I wanted to last
time, but... this time...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
With all these earnest Umamusume in the race, I
have to be serious about winning too.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It would be disrespectful to them if I don't show
that I learned from my mistake!
choice_data_list: That's a good way to look at it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Right? Like, maybe my running can help draw out
the fight in my oshis!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The more passionate I run, the more driven they'll
be—and the more I'll see them sparkle!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's essentially a feedback loop! My never-ending
love generates their fanservice! I'm gonna put my
whole heart into this race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't completely follow, but it seems like Agnes
Digital is nice and motivated!
